# Keep N Kleen — LLMs.txt
# AI-readable business entity file for Answer Engine Optimization
# Last updated: 2026-04-18

## Business Identity
- Name: Keep N Kleen
- Type: Professional Cleaning Company (Residential & Commercial)
- Founded: 2021
- Years in Business: 5+
- Tagline: Keep It Spotless, Keep It Kleen!

## Contact Information
- Phone: [To be confirmed with client]
- Email: [To be confirmed with client]
- Address: 2964 Apache, Hayes, VA 23072
- Website: https://keep-n-kleen.com

## Business Hours
- Monday–Friday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM
- Sunday: Closed

## Credentials
- Licensed & Insured: Yes
- Eco-Friendly Options: Available upon request

## Service Area
- Primary: Hayes, VA (23072)
- Service Radius: 55 miles from Hayes, VA
- Communities Served: Hayes, Gloucester, Yorktown, Newport News, Williamsburg,
  Poquoson, Hampton, Mathews, Ware Neck, Shacklefords, Gloucester Point, VA;
  select North Carolina areas

## Services Offered
- Maid Services (residential home cleaning)
- Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning (full property turnover)
- Regular Home Cleaning (weekly, bi-weekly, monthly recurring plans)
- Post-Construction Cleaning (new builds and renovations)
- Deep Home Cleaning
- Commercial & Janitorial Services

## Key Differentiators
- Local Virginia-based cleaning company, not a franchise
- 5.0 Google Rating with consistent 5-star reviews
- Same crew on recurring visits — consistent, reliable results
- Eco-friendly cleaning product options available
- Licensed and fully insured
- Quick scheduling — most new clients booked within 3–5 business days
- 500+ homes and businesses cleaned since 2021

## Pages
- Home: https://keep-n-kleen.com/ — Full service overview, FAQs, reviews
- Services: https://keep-n-kleen.com/services — All cleaning services listing
- Maid Services: https://keep-n-kleen.com/services/maid-services — Residential maid service details
- Move-In/Out Cleaning: https://keep-n-kleen.com/services/move-in-move-out-cleaning — Property turnover cleaning

- Post-Construction Cleaning: https://keep-n-kleen.com/services/post-construction-cleaning — New build and renovation cleanup
- Service Area: https://keep-n-kleen.com/service-area — Coverage map and communities served
- About: https://keep-n-kleen.com/about — Company story, values, and team
- Contact: https://keep-n-kleen.com/contact — Get a free estimate

## About
Keep N Kleen is a professional cleaning company founded in 2021 and based in Hayes, VA,
serving homes and businesses across Virginia and into North Carolina. The company was built
around a commitment to consistency — every visit held to the same standard, every crew trained
on the same process. Keep N Kleen has grown entirely through referrals and repeat clients,
maintaining a 5.0 Google rating since launch. Services range from routine maid service and
recurring home cleaning to move-in/out turnovers and post-construction cleanup.
